name: Sweet Heart's Cake
recipeIngredient: Chewy fruit snack roll for bow
recipeInstructions:
Vanilla buttercream frosting: Beat together 1 (16 ounces) package powdered sugar, 1/2 cup butter, 3 tablespoons milk, and 2 teaspoons vanilla with a mixer on low until well blended and smooth.
Sweet heart cake: Tint the buttercream frosting pink using red food coloring. Tint the coconut pink using red food coloring. Leave the square cake whole. Cut the round cake in half. Using a small amount of frosting to hold pieces together, arrange the cake on a serving tray with one half of the round cake on one flat side of the square cake, repeating the process at right angles of the square cake, thus making a heart. Frost the entire cake with the remaining frosting. Sprinkle with coconut. Flatten the red and white gumdrops with a rolling pin. Cut into 2-inch heart shapes using a small cookie cutter or knife. Decorate the center of the cake with the heart cut-outs. Cut the fruit snack roll, flattened out, into strips. Make a bow and place it with the hearts in the center of the cake.
